judge.rationale: The design correctly identifies all three domains (projects, tasks, notifications) matching the reference decomposition and responsibilities. Documentation is excellent with clear owner/consumer marking. However, ProjectLookupPort violates minimalism—it returns `Project | null` when the consumer only needs existence verification (compare: reference uses `exists(): Promise<boolean>`). Additionally, the internal storage ports (TaskStoragePort, ProjectStoragePort) are mentioned narratively but lack formal interface definitions, leaving abstraction boundaries implicit rather than explicit.
